---
title: "Artifacts"
---

## Public Artifact Set

This page exposes a curated traceability layer for the benchmark. The goal is to link the public narrative back to the frozen benchmark definition and the canonical statistics artifact without turning the site into a raw run browser.

::: {.artifact-callout}
::: {.artifact-card}
<strong>Benchmark identity</strong>
Use the manifest and freeze statement to verify what defines `benchmark-v1.0` and what changed only as an execution condition.
:::
::: {.artifact-card}
<strong>Result narrative</strong>
The executive summary and English results companion give the thesis-safe interpretation already maintained in the repo.
:::
::: {.artifact-card}
<strong>Canonical statistics</strong>
The public JSON keeps the site auditable and lets readers reproduce the headline tables and figures.
:::
:::

{{< include _includes/generated/artifact_links.md >}}

## Reproducibility Commands

```bash
uv sync --group dev --group site
uv run python scripts/build_site_data.py
quarto render site
```

The benchmark execution workflow itself remains in the repository docs and CLI entrypoints; this site only packages the public-facing benchmark companion.

## Explicit Exclusions

::: {.note-block}
- No `.tex` sources are linked from this site.
- Smoke-only directories are excluded from navigation.
- Exploratory reruns are excluded from navigation.
- Raw `trace.jsonl` execution dumps are excluded from navigation.
:::
